name: CLCSRISK_123_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE CLCSRISK_123_01
@CEKREF INT,
@CLREF INT OUTPUT,
@CLCIRO INT OUTPUT,
@RISKCEK FLOAT OUTPUT,
@REPRISKCEK FLOAT OUTPUT,
@RISKCEKC FLOAT OUTPUT,
@REPRISKCEKC FLOAT OUTPUT,
@NUMSREF INT OUTPUT,
@KC FLOAT OUTPUT,
@PS FLOAT OUTPUT,
@REPKC FLOAT OUTPUT,
@REPPS FLOAT OUTPUT,
@DOC INT OUTPUT,
@STATUS INT OUTPUT,
@PREVST INT OUTPUT,
@DEVIR INT OUTPUT,
@CEKAMNT FLOAT OUTPUT,
@CEKREP FLOAT OUTPUT,
@UPDAMNT INT OUTPUT,
@RISKCOLLATRL FLOAT OUTPUT,
@REPRISKCOLLATRL FLOAT OUTPUT,
@COLLATRLREF INT OUTPUT,
@NEWRISKCEK FLOAT OUTPUT,
@NEWREPRISKCEK FLOAT OUTPUT,
@NEWRISKCEKC FLOAT OUTPUT,
@NEWREPRISKCEKC FLOAT OUTPUT,
@CIROFLG SMALLINT OUTPUT
AS
DECLARE
@LREF INT,
@CARDREF INT,
@CSREF INT,
@STATNO INT,
@TRCODE INT,
@RFACT FLOAT,
@RFACTC FLOAT,
@SIGN INT,
@RISKTIPI SMALLINT,
@AMNT FLOAT,
@REPNET FLOAT,
@MAXSTAT INT,
@ROLLREF INT,
@ROLLTRCODE INT,
@ROLLPROCTYPE INT,
@ROLLCARDMD INT,
@RISKTYPE SMALLINT,
@NEWRFACT FLOAT,
@NEWRFACTC FLOAT,
@CURRSTAT FLOAT
DECLARE C_CURSOR CURSOR FOR
SELECT LOGICALREF,CSREF,STATNO,TRCODE,STATUS,CARDREF,DEVIR,ROLLREF
FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS
WHERE LOGICALREF=@CEKREF
ORDER BY CSREF,STATNO DESC
 OPEN C_CURSOR
   FETCH NEXT FROM C_CURSOR
 INTO @LREF, @CSREF, @STATNO,@TRCODE,@STATUS,@CARDREF,@DEVIR,@ROLLREF
    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
  BEGIN
         SELECT @RISKCEK = 0
  SELECT @REPRISKCEK = 0
  SELECT @KC = 0
  SELECT @PS = 0
  SELECT @REPKC = 0
  SELECT @REPPS = 0
  SELECT @CLREF = @CARDREF
  SELECT @AMNT = 0
  SELECT @REPNET = 0
  SELECT @DOC = 0
                SELECT @PREVST = 0
  SELECT @CEKAMNT = 0
                SELECT @CEKREP = 0
  SELECT @UPDAMNT = 1
                SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
  SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
                SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = 0
  SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = 0
    SELECT @CIROFLG = 0
    SELECT @AMNT = AMOUNT , @REPNET = REPORTNET, @DOC = DOC, @CIROFLG = CIRO, @CURRSTAT = CURRSTAT  FROM LG_123_01_CSCARD WHERE LOGICALREF = @CSREF
    SELECT @MAXSTAT = MAX(STATNO) FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE  CSREF = @CSREF
    SELECT @PREVST =  STATUS FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS  WHERE STATNO = @STATNO + 1 AND CSREF = @CSREF
                IF @DEVIR = 0
                  BEGIN SELECT @ROLLTRCODE = TRCODE , @ROLLPROCTYPE = PROCTYPE, @ROLLCARDMD = CARDMD  FROM LG_123_01_CSROLL WHERE LOGICALREF = @ROLLREF
                        IF (@ROLLTRCODE IN (9,10)) AND (@ROLLPROCTYPE = 7) AND (@ROLLCARDMD = 0)
                           SELECT @UPDAMNT = 0
                  END
  IF @CLREF = 0
   BEGIN
      SELECT @CLREF = CARDREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS  WHERE STATNO = @MAXSTAT AND CSREF = @CSREF
   END
    EXECUTE LG_GETCLNUMSREF_123_01 @CLREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTIPI OUTPUT
                  EXECUTE LG_GETCOLLTRLREF_123_01 @CLREF, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
      IF @DOC IN (1,3)
                      SELECT @RFACT = CEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
                    IF @DOC IN (2,4)
                      SELECT @RFACT = SENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
         IF @DOC = 1
           BEGIN
             IF @CIROFLG = 1
              SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTCIROCEKRISKFAC FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
             ELSE
              SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTCEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
           END
          IF @DOC = 2
           BEGIN
             IF @CIROFLG = 1
              SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTCIROSENETRISKFAC FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
             ELSE
              SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTSENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
           END
                    IF @DOC = 3
                      SELECT @NEWRFACT = CEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
                    IF @DOC = 4
                      SELECT @NEWRFACT = SENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE LOGICALREF=@NUMSREF
         IF @DOC = 1
                  BEGIN
         IF (@TRCODE = 0) AND (@STATUS IN (1,2))
                         BEGIN
                     SELECT @RISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT)
       SELECT @REPRISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET)
                            SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
       SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT)
       SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET)
                         END
                       IF (@TRCODE = 1) AND (@STATUS = 1)
                         BEGIN
                            SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
                            SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
                     SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
                     SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
                         END
         IF (@TRCODE = 3) AND (@STATUS = 2)
                         BEGIN
                            SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
              SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
                            SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
              SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -1 * @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
                         END
         IF @TRCODE IN (5,7)
    BEGIN
       SELECT @RISKCEK = 0
       SELECT @REPRISKCEK = 0
                            SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
                            SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = 0
       SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = 0
                         END
         IF @TRCODE = 9
                         BEGIN
                              IF @STATUS IN (1,6)
    BEGIN
                     SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
                             SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
                                   SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
                             SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                                   SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
                             SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
                                   IF @PREVST IN (2,3,4)
                         BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = 0
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEK = 0
                                          SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
                     SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
                                          SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = 0
                     SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = 0
           END
    END
                              IF @STATUS = 8
           BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
       SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET )
                                   SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
       SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
                                   SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
       SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET )
       IF @PREVST = 2
         BEGIN
                          SELECT @CLCIRO = CARDREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE STATNO = @STATNO + 1 AND CSREF = @CSREF
              IF @CLCIRO <> 0
       BEGIN
          SELECT @RFACTC = CEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO
                                SELECT @RFACT = CEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
                                 IF @CIROFLG = 1
                                   SELECT @NEWRFACTC = CSTCIROCEKRISKFAC FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO
                                  ELSE
                                    SELECT @NEWRFACTC = CSTCEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO
                                SELECT @NEWRFACT = CEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
          EXECUTE LG_GETCLNUMSREF_123_01 @CLREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTIPI OUTPUT
                                             EXECUTE LG_GETCOLLTRLREF_123_01 @CLREF, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
          SELECT @RISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
          SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET )
                                             SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
          SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET )
          SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
          SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
       END
                 END
             IF @PREVST IN (3,4)
         BEGIN
          SELECT @CLREF = CARDREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE STATNO = @MAXSTAT AND CSREF = @CSREF
          SELECT @RFACT = CEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
               IF @CIROFLG = 1
                 SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTCIROCEKRISKFAC FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
               ELSE
                   SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTCEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
          EXECUTE LG_GETCLNUMSREF_123_01 @CLREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTIPI OUTPUT
                                             EXECUTE LG_GETCOLLTRLREF_123_01 @CLREF, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
          SELECT @RISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
          SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET )
                                             SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
          SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET )
                                     END
                                END
                              IF (@STATUS = 11) AND (@CURRSTAT IN (11,12,13,14))
                                BEGIN
                     SELECT @KC = 1 * @AMNT
       SELECT @REPKC = 1 * @REPNET
              IF @PREVST = 2
         BEGIN
                          SELECT @CLCIRO = CARDREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE STATNO = @MAXSTAT AND CSREF = @CSREF
                   IF @CLCIRO <> 0
              BEGIN
                                             SELECT @CLREF = @CLCIRO
                                SELECT @RFACT = CEKRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO
                               EXECUTE LG_GETCLNUMSREF_123_01 @CLREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTIPI OUTPUT
                                             EXECUTE LG_GETCOLLTRLREF_123_01 @CLREF, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
            SELECT @KC = 1 * @AMNT
          SELECT @REPKC = 1 * @REPNET
       END
                                     END
                                END
                         END
           END
  IF @DOC = 2
    BEGIN
         IF (@TRCODE = 0) AND (@STATUS IN (1,2))
           BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT)
                            SELECT @REPRISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET)
                            SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
                            SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT)
                            SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET)
           END
         IF (@TRCODE = 2) AND (@STATUS = 1)
           BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
              SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
              SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
              SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
              SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
           END
         IF (@TRCODE = 4) AND (@STATUS = 2)
           BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
              SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
              SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
              SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
              SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
           END
         IF @TRCODE IN (6,8)
           BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = 0
              SELECT @REPRISKCEK = 0
              SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
              SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
              SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = 0
              SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = 0
           END
         IF @TRCODE = 10
           BEGIN
                IF @STATUS IN (1,6,11)
                 BEGIN
                     SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
                     SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
                     SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                     SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
                     SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
                     IF (@PREVST IN (3,4,5))
                      BEGIN
                        SELECT @RISKCEK = 0
                               SELECT @REPRISKCEK = 0
                        SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
                               SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
                                                    SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = 0
                               SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = 0
                      END
                 END
                 IF (@STATUS = 7) AND (@CURRSTAT IN (7,12,13,14))
                  BEGIN
                         SELECT @PS =  @AMNT
                         SELECT @REPPS = @REPNET
                  END
                 IF @STATUS = 8
                   BEGIN
                          SELECT @RISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
                          SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET )
                          SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
                          SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
                          SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
                          SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET )
                          IF @PREVST = 2
                           BEGIN
                                 SELECT @CLCIRO = CARDREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE STATNO = @STATNO + 1 AND CSREF = @CSREF
                                 IF @CLCIRO <> 0
                                   BEGIN
                                      SELECT @RFACTC = SENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO
                                                                         SELECT @NEWRFACTC = SENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLCIRO
                                                            SELECT @RFACT = SENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
                                      EXECUTE LG_GETCLNUMSREF_123_01 @CLREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTIPI OUTPUT
                                                                         EXECUTE LG_GETCOLLTRLREF_123_01 @CLREF, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
                                      SELECT @RISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
                                      SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET )
                                      SELECT @RISKCEKC = -((1-@RFACTC) * @AMNT )
                                      SELECT @REPRISKCEKC = -((1-@RFACTC) * @REPNET )
                                                                         SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
                                      SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                                                                         SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
                                      SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET )
                                                                         SELECT @NEWRISKCEKC = -((1-@NEWRFACTC) * @AMNT )
                                      SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEKC = -((1-@NEWRFACTC) * @REPNET )
                                   END
                           END
                           IF @PREVST IN (3,5)
                            BEGIN
                                  SELECT @CLREF = CARDREF FROM LG_123_01_CSTRANS WHERE STATNO = @MAXSTAT AND CSREF = @CSREF
                                  SELECT @RFACT = SENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
                                  IF @CIROFLG = 1
                                   SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTCIROCEKRISKFAC FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
                                  ELSE
                                     SELECT @NEWRFACT = CSTSENETRISKFACTOR FROM LG_123_01_CLRNUMS WHERE CLCARDREF = @CLREF
                                  EXECUTE LG_GETCLNUMSREF_123_01 @CLREF, @NUMSREF OUTPUT, @RISKTIPI OUTPUT
                                  EXECUTE LG_GETCOLLTRLREF_123_01 @CLREF, @COLLATRLREF OUTPUT, @RISKTYPE OUTPUT
                                  SELECT @RISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
                                  SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET )
                                  SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1* @AMNT
                                  SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                                  SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
                                  SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET )
                            END
                   END
                   END
    END
  IF @DOC = 3
    BEGIN
         IF (@TRCODE = 0) AND (@STATUS = 9)
    BEGIN
                      SELECT @RISKCEK = 0
        SELECT @REPRISKCEK = 0
                             SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = 0
        SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = 0
                             SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = 0
        SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = 0
    END
                       IF (@TRCODE = 3) AND (@STATUS = 9)
    BEGIN
       SELECT @RISKCEK = @RFACT * @AMNT
       SELECT @REPRISKCEK = @RFACT * @REPNET
           SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = @AMNT
       SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = @NEWRFACT * @AMNT
       SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWRFACT * @REPNET
    END
                       IF (@TRCODE = 11) AND (@STATUS = 6)
    BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
       SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
                            SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
       SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
       SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
    END
                       IF (@TRCODE = 11) AND (@STATUS = 8)
    BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
       SELECT @REPRISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET )
                    SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = @AMNT
       SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
       SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET )
    END
    END
  IF @DOC = 4
                  BEGIN
          IF (@TRCODE = 4) AND (@STATUS = 10)
                         BEGIN
                            SELECT @RISKCEK = @RFACT * @AMNT
                     SELECT @REPRISKCEK = @RFACT * @REPNET
                            SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL =  @AMNT
                     SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL =  @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = @NEWRFACT * @AMNT
                     SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = @NEWRFACT * @REPNET
                         END
                       IF (@TRCODE = 12) AND (@STATUS = 6)
                         BEGIN
               SELECT @RISKCEK = -@RFACT * @AMNT
        SELECT @REPRISKCEK = -@RFACT * @REPNET
               SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @AMNT
        SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = -1 * @REPNET
                             SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @AMNT
        SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = -@NEWRFACT * @REPNET
    END
                       IF (@TRCODE = 12) AND (@STATUS = 8)
                         BEGIN
              SELECT @RISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @AMNT )
       SELECT @REPRISKCEK = ((1-@RFACT) * @REPNET)
                     SELECT @RISKCOLLATRL = @AMNT
       SELECT @REPRISKCOLLATRL = @REPNET
                            SELECT @NEWRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @AMNT )
       SELECT @NEWREPRISKCEK = ((1-@NEWRFACT) * @REPNET)
    END
    END
                  IF (@STATUS NOT IN (1,6,8,9,10)) OR (@TRCODE IN (13,14))
                    BEGIN
                        SELECT @CEKAMNT = 0
                        SELECT @CEKREP = 0
                    END
                  IF (@STATUS IN (1,9,10)) AND (@TRCODE NOT IN (13,14))
                    BEGIN
                         IF @PREVST IN (2,3,4)
                           BEGIN
                                SELECT @CEKAMNT = 0
                                SELECT @CEKREP = 0
                           END
                         IF @PREVST NOT IN (2,3,4)
                           BEGIN
                                SELECT @CEKAMNT = @AMNT
                                SELECT @CEKREP = @REPNET
                           END
                    END
                  IF @STATUS IN (6,8)
                    BEGIN
                        SELECT @CEKAMNT = -1 * @AMNT
                        SELECT @CEKREP = -1 * @REPNET
                    END
 FETCH NEXT FROM C_CURSOR
INTO @LREF, @CSREF, @STATNO,@TRCODE,@STATUS,@CARDREF,@DEVIR,@ROLLREF
END
CLOSE C_CURSOR
DEALLOCATE C_CURSOR
